cards.example: She accomplished all her goals this year.
The report must be accurate and detailed.

cards.hint: 联想：a chief(首领)完成任务
cards.example: Hard work helps you achieve success.

cards.hint: ad(向)+apt(合适)，向合适方向调整
cards.example: We need to adapt to the new environment.

cards.hint: ad(足够)+equate(等同)，足够等同于要求
cards.example: The salary is adequate for a fresh graduate.

cards.hint: 分解(ana-)然后研究每个部分
cards.example: We need to analyze the market data carefully.
What approach did you take to solve this problem?
Don't assume you know everything.
Regular exercise benefits both body and mind.
We collaborate with teams across departments.
The project requires full commitment from everyone.
It's essential to communicate clearly in business.
We need a comprehensive plan to succeed.
Consider the consequences of your decisions.

cards.back: 一致的；始终如一的；持续的
cards.hint: con(共同)+sist(站立)，一直站在同一立场
cards.example: Be consistent with your efforts every day.

cards.hint: con(共同)+tribute(给予)，共同给予=贡献
cards.example: Each team member should contribute ideas.

cards.hint: dead+line，过了这条线就'死了'（任务失效）
cards.example: Please submit the report before the deadline.

cards.hint: de(向下)+legate(派遣)，向下派遣=授权
cards.example: A good manager knows how to delegate tasks.
Can you demonstrate how this software works?

cards.hint: de(完全)+termine(结束)，彻底结束争议=决定
cards.example: We need to determine the cause of the problem.
An efficient workflow saves both time and money.
We must evaluate the risks before proceeding.
Good tools facilitate better communication.
Please give me feedback on my presentation.

cards.back: 灵活的；可变通的；柔韧的
cards.example: We offer flexible working hours.

cards.back: 实施；执行；实现（动词）；工具（名词）
cards.hint: im(进入)+plement(填满)，把计划填充进现实
cards.example: We will implement the new policy next month.

cards.hint: initiat(开始)+ive，主动开始事情的能力
cards.example: She always takes the initiative at work.
We need innovative solutions to modern problems.
We need to integrate all the systems.

cards.back: 里程碑；重要事件；重要阶段
cards.example: Completing this phase is a key milestone.

cards.hint: neg(无)+otiate(闲暇)，没有闲暇=认真谈
cards.example: We need to negotiate the contract terms.

cards.back: 目标；目的（名词）；客观的（形容词）
cards.hint: object(对象)+ive，面向对象=目标/客观
cards.example: Set clear objectives for each project.
We should optimize our workflow to save time.

cards.hint: out(向外)+come(来)，从内向外来=结果
cards.example: The outcome of the meeting was positive.
Try to see things from a different perspective.

cards.back: 优先权；重点；最重要的事
cards.example: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.

cards.back: 主动的；积极主动的；有前瞻性的
cards.hint: pro(向前)+active(主动)，提前主动行动
cards.example: Be proactive rather than reactive to problems.

cards.back: 富有成效的；多产的；有益的
cards.hint: product(产品)+ive，能产出产品=富有成效
cards.example: How can we make meetings more productive?
Please review the business proposal by Friday.

cards.back: 相关的；有关的；有实际意义的
cards.hint: relev(提起)+ant，与话题提起来的东西相关
cards.example: Please only share relevant information.

cards.back: 可靠的；值得信赖的；稳定的
cards.example: We need a reliable data source for this report.
It's your responsibility to meet the deadline.

cards.back: 重要的；有意义的；显著的
cards.hint: signif(标志)+icant，值得留下标记=重要
cards.example: This is a significant improvement in our process.

cards.back: 利益相关者；股东；参与方
cards.hint: stake(赌注/桩)+holder，持有利益桩的人
cards.example: We must keep all stakeholders informed.

cards.hint: strat(军营)+gy，源自军事的方法=战略
cards.example: We need a clear strategy to enter the market.

cards.hint: substance(物质)+ial，有实质物质=大量的
cards.example: There has been a substantial increase in sales.
We aim for sustainable business growth.

cards.hint: trans(穿透)+parent(显现)，可以穿透看到
cards.example: Be transparent about your decision-making process.
This is an urgent matter that needs attention.

cards.hint: vers(转变)+ion，转变后的形式=版本
cards.example: Please use the latest version of the software.
